name: kick_scraper
title: Kick Clip Scraper
description: Retrieve public Kick clip metadata, playback, engagement, category, creator, and channel details from a clip URL.

logo.label: Kick logo
logo.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect width="64" height="64" rx="12" fill="#53fc18"/><path d="M13 14h12v12h5V14h21v14h-7v8h7v14H30V38h-5v12H13z" fill="#0b0b0b"/></svg>

seo.title: Kick Clip Scraper API
seo.description: Extract public Kick clip metadata, video URL, thumbnail, views, likes, category, creator, and channel data.
seo.intro: Kick Clip Scraper resolves a public clip URL through Better Fetch's resilient retrieval path and returns normalized playback, engagement, category, creator, and channel metadata for agents, monitoring systems, research pipelines, and creator-analysis workflows.

useCases.title: Clip monitoring
useCases.description: Capture durable clip identifiers, titles, engagement, and timestamps.

useCases.title: Media workflows
useCases.description: Resolve the public playback and thumbnail URLs for downstream processing.

useCases.title: Creator research
useCases.description: Connect a clip to its creator, channel, and content category.

faqs.question: Does it need a Kick login?
faqs.answer: No. It retrieves only metadata Kick exposes publicly for the requested clip.

faqs.question: Can I pass a clip id?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pass either the full public Kick clip URL or its clip_ identifier.

faqs.question: Does it download the video?
faqs.answer: No. It returns the public playback URL and metadata.

url.description: Full public Kick clip URL or clip_ identifier.

is_mature.description: Whether Kick marks the clip mature
